code: export class GangRanksParser{constructor(){this._ranks=[];}flush(){this._ranks=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<count;i++){this._ranks.push({id:wrapper.readInt(),name:wrapper.readString(),position:wrapper.readInt(),canInvite:wrapper.readBoolean(),canKick:wrapper.readBoolean(),canAlert:wrapper.readBoolean(),canEditRanks:wrapper.readBoolean(),canAccessBank:wrapper.readBoolean(),isAdmin:wrapper.readBoolean()});}return true;}get ranks(){return this._ranks;}}
